Module 4:
Your Pre-Prelaunch, Part 6
!
Executive Summary
Part 3: Warming your list
• 	Send them good content
• 	Give them awesome free stuff
• 	2-3 pieces of content is perfect, that’s a big win
• 	If you let the list go cold, give them a reason why
• 	Don’t be afraid to be personal
• 	Be aspirational
• 	Tell them a story of someone who achieved something in a
relevant way
• 	Shot Across the Bow - let them know something is coming
!
Part 4: Pre-prelaunch assets and planning
• 	Your current assets - as they relate to pre-pre launch to create buzz,
gather data, build relationship
!
